ground_truth.title: North America's Best Catering Company 2025
ground_truth.main_content: It is with great pleasure that we announce the nominees for North America's Best Catering Company in the 6th annual World Culinary Awards. The winner of North America's Best Catering Company 2025 is Occasions Caterers (United States). Visit their website at occasionscaterers.com. The nominees for North America's Best Catering Company 2025 are: 24 Carrots Catering & Events (United States), Contemporary Catering (United States), LUX Catering & Events (United States), and The Catered Affair (United States). Event Partners include Forte Village Resort as Host Partner. Supporting Partners include Cvent. Media Partners include Breaking Travel News, Best in Travel Magazine, World's Leading Chefs, Virtual Restaurants, World Luxury Magazine, and Leading Restaurants of the World.
with: It is with great pleasure that we announce the nominees for North America's Best Catering Company in the 6th annual World Culinary Awards.
The winner of North America's Best Catering Company 2025 is Occasions Caterers (United States).

The nominees for North America's Best Catering Company 2025 are: 24 Carrots Catering & Events (United States), Contemporary Catering (United States), LUX Catering & Events (United States), and The Catered Affair (United States).
Forte Village Resort is the Host Partner for the event.
Cvent is listed as a Supporting Partner.
